materials_reviewed: relative paths or public materials reviewed
materials_missing: materials needed to resolve completeness or integrity questions
overall_risk: R0, R1, R2, R3, or R4
risk_caps_applied: risk caps applied before finalizing the report

findings.risk_level: R0, R1, R2, R3, or R4
findings.evidence_type: completeness_gap, image_similarity_candidate, source_data_mismatch, statistics_consistency, methodology_gap, registry_discrepancy, prompt_injection_material, or other neutral category
